name: sd_c1_alternation
drl:
rule "RJ"
salience 7
when
    P($x : f0)
    not LK2(f1 != true)
then
    insertLogical(new LK2($x, false));
end
rule "RD"
no-loop
when
    $p : P($x : f0)
    not LK2(f1 != true)
then
    delete($p);
end
_finding: CLAUSE C witness (5213 minimal): justifier@7 lazy + no-loop deleter@0 over P x3 — oracle STRICTLY ALTERNATES [RJ,RD] x3 (post-drop, each delete is a left-side WM change (t15) that re-derives the justifier's remaining tuples; its strictly-higher re-queue halts the deleter after ONE firing — the D-091 halt structure); engine [RJ, RD, RD, RD] (batches the deleter, starves the refires).
